Dialog.name: MSG_731_0_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 5}All right. Let's start by going over how to attack Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_731_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 5}When faced with an enemy, you have two primary options for fending them off. The first option is to use your equipped weapon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_731_0_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 5}The second option is to use your Persona. But remember, every Persona has its own strengths and weaknesses.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_731_0_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 5}Knowing how Personas work will be crucial. Try summoning yours right now.[n]{f 1 1}
